title: psychotria proxima
intro: Psychotria proxima, also known as Wild Coffee or Mountain Coffee, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, containing alkaloids such as caffeine and theobromine, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Psychotria proxima include its ability to stimulate circulation, lower blood pressure, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and is also used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and capsules, to harness its medicinal properties.
